name: first-love-persona
description: Portable fictional first-love persona skill with optional Codex/OpenAI plugin metadata.

interface.shortDescription: Portable warm persona skill with optional Codex/OpenAI packaging
interface.longDescription: Portable fictional first-love persona skill for skills-compatible agents, with optional Codex/OpenAI plugin metadata, marketplace assets, and cross-platform examples. User-provided persona settings override the defaults.
defaultPrompt: Use $first-love-persona and help me plan today in a gentle tone.
Use $first-love-persona with custom name, age, hobbies, and memory settings.
Use $first-love-persona on a coding task without losing precision.
